Label4.name: Label4
Label4.label: In this module, you must assess compliance by examining the evidence for each test linked to the requirement. Each piece of evidence is systematically catalogued with a unique identifier and name, along with relevant details such as collection initiation and conclusion dates. Your goal is to evaluate this evidence against established industry standards, recording any non-conformities or potential enhancements as findings. To add additional proof or schedule subsequent collection round, simply select the desired evidence from the dropdown, set the date range, and click the 'Set 3rd Round Dates' button.

GridObservations.name: GridObservations
GridObservations.label: Enter any findings/audit findings related to this requirement.

GridCheckListConduct.name: GridCheckListConduct
GridCheckListConduct.label: The checklist below is tailored to this requirement. Please ensure all items are completed before proceeding.

Label5.name: Label5
Label5.label:
This interface is designed to help you substantiate audit requirements by documenting the results of your evidence, attaching relevant files, and incorporating necessary links. To provide your evidence, you may:

1. Detail the outcome in the 'Describe the evidence result' text box.
2. Attach supporting documents by selecting 'Upload Files' or by dragging and dropping files onto the designated area.
3. Add hyperlinks by entering URLs in the 'Input URL to the Evidence' field and clicking 'Add Evidence Link.' Optionally, provide a display name for clarity.

Please ensure all submitted evidence is relevant and supports the compliance of the requirement. Remember to save your changes before proceeding to accurately record all information.
